data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Deterministic resolution order (scope > location > biz default)', but there is no evidence provided that confirms this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case describes the need for a deterministic resolution order, yet the prior steps do not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate this order is functioning as intended. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence provided regarding this requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming the deterministic resolution order (scope > location > biz default) is satisfied.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add validation for deterministic resolution order
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the resolution order is correctly implemented and functioning as expected.
